trades.reasoning: Perfect momentum score with all five bullish signals firing — MACD crossover, rising histogram, RSI in bullish zone at 69.8, price above SMA-20, and volume surge — while AI/data analytics tailwinds remain structurally strong.
Perfect score with all five bullish signals including a volume surge and RSI at 69.1, offering a large-cap anchor with lower volatility than speculative names while deploying remaining idle cash.

decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today — a neutral consolidation session with NASDAQ up just 0.1% and S&P 500 unchanged. With five open slots and $783 in idle cash, deploying into the two cleanest momentum setups (PLTR and EBAY) made sense. All five existing positions remain within normal range and away from stop-loss levels, so no exits were warranted.

market_education.summary_en: Equities drifted sideways in a low-conviction session as investors balanced cautious optimism from recent earnings beats against lingering macro uncertainty around trade policy and the Federal Reserve's rate path. Technology led marginally higher, reflecting continued rotation into AI and semiconductor names after recent pullbacks, while defensive sectors lagged. The flat tape suggests the market is in a 'wait and see' mode ahead of additional economic data and Fed commentary expected later this week.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日股市在缺乏方向感的環境下小幅盤整，投資人一方面消化部分企業財報優於預期的正面訊息，另一方面仍對貿易政策走向及聯準會利率路徑存有疑慮。科技板塊小幅領漲，反映市場持續輪動至人工智慧及半導體概念股，防禦性板塊則相對落後。整體走勢反映市場正處於觀望狀態，等待本週稍晚公布的經濟數據及聯準會官員的進一步發言。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy of buying stocks that have been trending upward — using signals like RSI, MACD crossovers, and price relative to moving averages to identify stocks with building buying pressure. The idea is that stocks already moving up tend to keep moving up in the short term, driven by institutional accumulation and positive sentiment. The screener above is essentially a momentum filter, ranking candidates by how many bullish momentum signals are aligned at once.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入已處於上升趨勢的股票，透過RSI、MACD黃金交叉及股價相對均線等技術指標，辨識出買盤持續累積的個股。其核心邏輯是：已在上漲的股票，受法人持續買進與市場情緒推動，短期內往往延續漲勢。本系統的選股篩選器本質上即為動能過濾器，依據同時觸發的多空訊號數量對候選股進行排序。
